title: Don't Go Gentle: A Film About IDLES
original_title: Don't Go Gentle: A Film About IDLES
overview: Journey through celebrated British band IDLES' determination, friendship and adversity as they fight for a place in a divided sociopolitical environment, unexpectedly inspiring and unifying an international community along the way.
